allow: Bash(git commit -m 'chore: scaffold Next.js 16 + Tailwind v4 + install dependencies *)
Bash(git commit -m 'style: configure Tailwind v4 @theme tokens and global base styles *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: root layout with next/font and Lenis smooth scroll provider *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add animation variants and all site constants *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add hooks — usePrefersReducedMotion, useScrollReveal, useCustomCursor *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add UI components — CustomCursor, ScrollReveal, PillarBadge, StackBadge *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: page assembly shell and section stubs *)
